name: cross_arch_enc_dec_nib
source_arch: T5 (enc-dec, relative pos, cross-attention, ReLU FFN, 32128 vocab)
target_arch: GPT-2-medium (dec-only, abs pos, causal MHA, GELU FFN, 50257 vocab)
d_abi_note: fixed shared dimension -- same for all models in all experiments
t5_mode: prefix-LM (encoder=prefix, decoder=continuation) -- fixes Exp37 degenerate oracle
claim: Domain knowledge encoded in T5-large's ABI space (encoder-decoder architecture, prefix-LM mode, SentencePiece 32128 vocab, relative position encoding) transfers to GPT-2-medium (decoder-only architecture, BPE 50257 vocab, absolute position encoding) via orthogonal Procrustes rotation with sentence-level mean-pool alignment, achieving NIB distributional equivalence in GPT-2's native 50257-token vocabulary. Source and target models differ in architecture class (encoder-decoder vs decoder-only), attention mechanism (cross-attention vs causal), position encoding (relative vs absolute), and tokenizer. This closes the encoder-decoder <-> decoder-only transfer gap.
